creator: mayhem30@gmail.com
text:
I've not been able to updated my ports using ports-mgmt/synth for a couple days now.

This is the error I've been receiving :

$ sudo synth status
Regenerating flavor index: this may take a while ...
Scanning entire ports tree.
 progress: 58.88%              
culprit: misc/py-streamlit
  Scan aborted because 'make' encounted an error in the Makefile.
  misc/py-streamlit (return code = 2)
Flavor index generation failed: ports scan

I'm assuming this port has been deleted, but wasn't removed from misc/Makefile?
